title: The Poison Gas Called Koro
description: On pages 16–18, this part focuses on the poison gas called koro within the The Poison Gas Called Koro storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Tonight's a full moon,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But it appears to be hidden by the clouds. We're lucky.

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Sorry for dragging you along too, Carrot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's okay. I'm also a ruler's bird, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Be careful!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So, Wanda... based on what you said...

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Yeah. Curly and gasbrain haven't yet disappeared from your story.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: that event... to be honest,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We haven't told most of this coun- try's inhabitants what actually happened.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They just had their entire country destroyed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We didn't want to give them further cause to worry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: All of this happened rather secretly. That too, only two days ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Steel yourselves as you listen to this tale.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: It may very well be that Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: is no longer able...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: to return to us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WHAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But he said he'd come back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: In his letter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That's what we're trying to tell you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What actually happened was a lot more serious!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This place is known as a "Phantom Island"... because the island itself is a living being,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Log poses do not point to it. Normally, it's all but impossible to find.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: However, a grave mistake and an over- sight...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: were committed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Though we managed to slip away from our enemy's ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You guys, head for you ahead of us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We allowed them to catch wind of our destination.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: In addition, on their ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: unbeknowned to us, there rode a native of this phantom Island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: In other words, two days ago, Bigmam's ship came calling.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We're here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: No problem.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: two of us should be more than enough.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Leave this to me, Mama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Roar!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Zou is my Homeland!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Could a yonkou be involved in Sanji's disappearance?

summary: The Poison Gas Called Koro: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
